title: Record: X-WING — Shared N-gram Tables + Cubric (val_bpb=0.5644)
author: newjordan

data.description: Chunk-based shared n-gram tables where all 8 GPU ranks update the same tables using the same tokens, giving each rank the full token history instead of rank-local subsets.
Cubric per-order adaptive alpha that suppresses noisy n-gram orders and boosts reliable higher orders based on model entropy.

novel_contributions: Shared chunk-based n-gram tables across all GPU ranks
Score-first chunk evaluation before table updates
Full 62M-token shared context across ranks instead of rank-local tables
